spaces.title: Spaces designed for your rest and well-being
spaces.desc: Our rooms are designed to offer privacy, comfort, and tranquility from the very first moment. With independent access, good ventilation, and high levels of cleanliness, every detail contributes to a pleasant stay. Additionally, common areas such as the gardens, terrace, and restaurant-bar complement the experience with options to relax and enjoy the surroundings.

items.title: Room 1
items.desc: Enjoy a comfortable and relaxing stay in our spacious room, ideal for couples, families, or groups. Equipped with comfortable beds, air conditioning, a private bathroom, and warm decor with colonial touches, this room offers the perfect balance between comfort and Cuban authenticity.

images.alt: Double bedroom with air conditioning
Cozy beds with rustic decor
Room with garden view and safe box
Bathroom with blue and yellow tiles

items.title: Room 2
items.desc: Discover our spacious and bright room, ideal for families or groups. With three comfortable beds, this room offers the perfect atmosphere to relax. Enjoy the natural light coming through the large sliding window and the beautiful garden view outside.

images.alt: Triple room with blue wall and garden view
Blue room with night lighting
View from the bed towards the patio
Detail of the lamp on the bedside table

items.title: Room 3
items.desc: Ideal room for relaxing after a day of exploration. This room offers the essentials for a comfortable stay. Enjoy the natural light that illuminates the space and the tranquility it provides.

images.alt: Double room with black headboards
Room with sunset lighting
Detail of the room's safe and shelving
Grey marble bathroom with pink towel
Decorative lighting during golden hour
Detail of red honeycomb lamp

items.title: Room 4
items.desc: Relax in this cozy room in Viñales, ideal for your stay. With two comfortable single beds and a decoration in warm tones, this space offers everything needed for a pleasant stay.

images.alt: Twin beds with red and white decor
Double room with maroon accent wall
View through the window towards a yellow villa
Private patio with white wrought iron chairs

items.title: Room 5 — Suite
items.desc: Immerse yourself in a unique suite, designed to offer you the perfect balance between comfort and style. Intended for couples, its cozy atmosphere and elegant decoration create the ideal setting for rest. The natural light that floods the space enhances its warmth, inviting you to relax after a day of exploration in Viñales.
items.capacity: 1 king size bed / private bathroom / 2 people

images.alt: Cozy bedroom with queen bed and red walls
Bedside view with red pillows
Bedroom view of the tropical garden
Bathroom sink and tiled walls
Bedroom view with access to the terrace

spaces.title: Bar-Restaurant
spaces.desc: Our restaurant is spacious and welcomes multiple diners, offering an air-conditioned atmosphere or, if you prefer, access to the garden to enjoy the views. The bar, located next to a swimming pool on a small terrace, invites you to relax while savoring exquisite cocktails. An ideal place to enjoy a unique experience.

images.alt: Wooden table set for lunch with white dinnerware, fresh flowers, and wooden chairs in the villa's restaurant.
Wooden Villa Los Reyes Bar Restaurant sign on a stone wall with hanging wine glasses.
Rustic bar at Villa Los Reyes with hanging glass goblets and wine bottles against light stone walls.
Cozy view of the interior of Villa Los Reyes restaurant with arranged wooden tables and rustic decor

spaces.title: Gardens and pool
spaces.desc: Our garden is set with local plants that highlight the greenery and Cuban nature. Enjoy a pleasant climate, with abundant sun exposure, perfect for relaxing. In addition, it features a swimming pool so you can enjoy a refreshing dip in a unique and tranquil setting.

images.alt: Tropical garden with pool, red umbrellas, and palm trees with mountain views
Sunny patio with grass paths, white iron chairs, and yellow facades
Detailed view of vibrant red flowers and lush vegetation next to the pool area
Garden landscape with green lawn and palm trees seen from the shade of a porch

spaces.title: Terrace
spaces.desc: Our rooftop terrace offers stunning views that will allow you to enjoy unique moments. With several comfortable spaces, it is the ideal place to relax, have breakfast, or enjoy a meal while contemplating the landscape. A perfect corner for a pleasant time surrounded by nature.

images.alt: White wrought iron table and chairs on a terrace.
Wide view of the terrace with terracotta floors, white railing, and a red-roofed gazebo
Classic style white garden bench surrounded by palm trees and red flowers in pots
Close-up of a white wrought iron coffee table on a terrace at sunset
